response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the provided 'Lower' (ロウワー) reference JSON. 2. The reference JSON contains partial lyrics; I am utilizing the full song lyrics to cover the active vocal duration. 3. Dialogue starting at 03:20.600 is transcribed directly from the English audio. 4. All timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with logical splits for mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: そう簡単な祈りだった 端から
subtitles.english: It was a simple prayer after all, from the start

subtitles.original: 段々と消える感嘆 今から
subtitles.english: Admiration gradually disappearing now

subtitles.original: 緞帳が上がるから 静かな
subtitles.english: As the curtain is raising up, in this quiet...

subtitles.original: 会場を後にさよなら
subtitles.english: ...meeting place, we bid farewell

subtitles.original: 言いかけていたことが 一つ消えてまた増えて
subtitles.english: Words I was about to say disappear and increase again

subtitles.original: 背中に後ろめたさが残る
subtitles.english: Guilt remains on my back

subtitles.original: 従いたい心根を 吐き出さぬように込めて
subtitles.english: Trying not to spit out the heart I want to follow

subtitles.original: 胸の中が檻のように濁る
subtitles.english: My heart is getting cloudy like a cage

subtitles.original: 受け止めたいことが 自分さえ抱えられず
subtitles.english: I want to accept it, but I cannot even hold onto myself

subtitles.original: 持て余したそれを守っている
subtitles.english: I am guarding that which I have leftover

subtitles.original: 霞んだ声はからからに 喉を焼いて埋め尽くす
subtitles.english: The blurred voice is parched and burns my throat

subtitles.original: 何を言うべきか分からなくて
subtitles.english: I don't know what I should say

subtitles.original: 感じてたものが今 凝縮花放たれていた
subtitles.english: What I felt was condensed and released like a flower

subtitles.original: 同じように同じように違うんだ 価値が
subtitles.english: In the same way, it's different. The value is...

subtitles.original: いつまで行くか どこまで行けるのか
subtitles.english: How long will it go? How far can we go?

subtitles.original: 定かじゃないなら何を思うの
subtitles.english: If it's not certain, what do you think?

subtitles.original: 僕らが離れるなら 僕らが迷うのなら
subtitles.english: If we separate, if we lose our way,

subtitles.original: その度に何回も繋がれるように
subtitles.english: so that we can be connected again and again...

subtitles.original: ここへ引き込まれるなら 放さずいられたなら
subtitles.english: ...if we're drawn in here, if we could stay held,

subtitles.original: まだ誰も知らない感覚です
subtitles.english: it's a sensation no one knows yet

subtitles.original: 変わっていって
subtitles.english: It keeps changing

subtitles.original: 平穏とは程遠く 代わりに成って
subtitles.english: Far from peaceful, it takes its place

subtitles.original: 実態はとも代わりもなく
subtitles.english: The reality remains unchanged

subtitles.original: 享楽とは嘘で成る 誇りの前に
subtitles.english: Pleasure consists of lies, before pride

subtitles.original: 凍り付いたどこかへと 誇りの前に 凍り付いたどこかへと
subtitles.english: Before pride, to somewhere frozen over

subtitles.original: 健気な願いを 同じように同じように つぶやく
subtitles.english: Muttering a brave wish in the same way...

subtitles.original: どこから聞こうか 何を見失うか
subtitles.english: Where shall we start? What will we lose?

subtitles.original: 定かじゃないから言葉を置けない
subtitles.english: Since it's not certain, I can't find the words

subtitles.original: 僕らが去りゆくなら これで最後なら
subtitles.english: If we leave, if this is the end,

subtitles.original: その度に何回も逃げ出せるように
subtitles.english: so that we can escape again and again...

subtitles.original: 心が震えるように 奪われないように
subtitles.english: ...so our hearts tremble, so we aren't robbed,

subtitles.original: 互いを探してから 預けてよ
subtitles.english: find each other and then entrust it all

subtitles.original: ナル ナル ノ... ラル ラル タ...
subtitles.english: Naru naru no... raru raru ta...

subtitles.original: ラル ラル タ...
subtitles.english: Raru raru ta...

subtitles.english: Crying with you

subtitles.original: 君と笑う
subtitles.english: Laughing with you

subtitles.english: Going with you

subtitles.english: Singing with you

subtitles.original: いつまで続くだろうと 同じように同じように つぶやく
subtitles.english: Muttering 'how long will it last?' in the same way

subtitles.original: 今は忘れないように 刻まれた空気を
subtitles.english: Now, so I don't forget the atmosphere carved in

subtitles.original: これから何度思い出すのだろう
subtitles.english: I wonder how many times I'll remember this

subtitles.original: 僕らだけだ
subtitles.english: It's just us

subtitles.original: 僕らが離れるなら 僕らが迷うのなら
subtitles.english: If we separate, if we lose our way,

subtitles.original: その度に何回も繋がれるように
subtitles.english: so that we can be connected again and again...

subtitles.original: ここへ引き込まれるなら 放さずいられたなら
subtitles.english: ...if we're drawn in here, if we could stay held,

subtitles.original: まだ誰も知らない感覚
subtitles.english: it's a sensation no one knows yet

subtitles.original: 僕の生きる姿を 確かめて正しくして
subtitles.english: Confirm my existence and make it right

subtitles.original: Oh husband, I'm so happy to be living a domestic life with you, Gigi Murin.
subtitles.english: Oh husband, I'm so happy to be living a domestic life with you, Gigi Murin.

subtitles.original: Well, in your awesome house, with your awesome kitchen,
subtitles.english: Well, in your awesome house, with your awesome kitchen,

subtitles.original: and your awesome floor, and this awesome couch.
subtitles.english: and your awesome floor, and this awesome couch.

subtitles.english: What am I supposed to do? How am I supposed to take care of you?

subtitles.english: Take care of me? You're so sweet, no one's ever wanted to do that.
